Light a bonfire? (You can save and return at the
bonfire.)

You need a torch to light a bonfire
(Let's make one at the workbench.)
Need a sickle... Let's make one at the workbench.
You obtained a Potion of Revival!
You obtained the soul of Mother Slime!

Haa... haa... We won~...! It was tough... but we
managed...
Ah~... I thought I was gonna die...

Hehe... but \V[3], you were pretty cool\i[12]. Have
you gotten stronger from our survival life?

Definitely, I feel like I've gotten stronger since
coming here... But I would've lost for sure without
you, mom.

Alright! Let's keep working hard together to get
through this!
You appraised the item dropped by the boss...

(Magic Lotion... I have a feeling it could be used for
something naughty!)
You need a stone pickaxe or better...
You need a stone pickaxe or better...
You need a stone pickaxe or better...
You need a pickaxe of stone quality or better...
You need a stone pickaxe or better...
You need a stone pickaxe or better...
You need a pickaxe made of stone or better...
Need a sickle... Let's make it at the workbench.
W-Wait...! What the hell... is that huge monster...!
A giant slime... I see... So that's the first boss!

Yeah, yeah, it's a tougher enemy than the usual small
fries, but usually, you can get some rare items if you
defeat it!

At first glance... it looks like it might use poison
attacks. Let's make sure our equipment and items are
ready before we challenge it!
Sigh... Why are your eyes sparkling so much...
I guess it's reassuring in a way...
Need a sickle... Let's make it at the workbench.

You can now use the magic circle to shortcut to the

Give-me fairy "Give me, give me vines, give me"
Give-me fairy "Yay! Thank you! Here's this as thanks!"
The give-me fairy went off somewhere
Let's repair the bridge (requires 5 pieces of wood)
A chicken-like creature is blocking the path...

Oh my...! A wild chicken-chan is here...! Let's keep
her, she might lay eggs or something\i[12]

Ah...!? That tail... It's the one you often see in
games!
Mom! Stay away! That's a cockatrice!
Mom! Take off your clothes now!

That monster has the ability to petrify anyone who
gets close...!
What...!? Was that light from earlier it?
Just do as I say for now!

I had mom take off her clothes and assume a stable
pose...

Mom washed off the semen that was all over her body
with the pond water...
(But... he did his best for me...\i[12])
